Name: Pattern Recognition - PE
Text: First I need to understand the existing model The given declare_model has existence constraints for StartApplication and FinalDecision Init is StartApplication Coexistence between StartApplication and FinalDecision Response from StartApplication to RequestAdditionalInfo Succession from RequestAdditionalInfo to FinalDecision

Name: Abductive Reasoning - PE
Text: But the problem is that there might be bias For example if FinalDecision is Reject it might be happening right after checking sensitive attributes without proper checks So I need to add constraints to mitigate that

Name: Hypothesis Generation - IND
Text: So perhaps we need to introduce new activities like CheckApplicantRace ManualReview BiasMitigationCheck etc

Name: Backtracking - IND
Text: Wait but the initial model does not have ManualReview So perhaps in the solution we need to add existence constraints for ManualReview and then other constraints involving it

Name: Deductive Reasoning - PE
Text: Therefore we need to ensure that CheckApplicantRace and ManualReview are included in the existence constraints

Name: Hypothesis Generation - PE
Text: So for example add existence for CheckApplicantRace and ManualReview Then add coexistence between CheckApplicantRace and ManualReview Add non succession between CheckApplicantRace and FinalDecision Add precedence so that ManualReview happens before FinalDecision

Name: Deductive Reasoning - PE
Text: Nonsuccession CheckApplicantRace FinalDecision would prevent FinalDecision from coming right after CheckApplicantRace

Name: Deductive Reasoning - PE
Text: Precedence ManualReview FinalDecision would mean that FinalDecision cannot occur unless ManualReview has occurred before

Name: Backtracking - IND
Text: But precedence ManualReview FinalDecision would apply to all FinalDecisions not just those related to sensitive attributes But perhaps this is acceptable as a fairness measure

Name: Validation - PE
Text: If CheckApplicantRace is in the trace then ManualReview must coexist and must occur after CheckApplicantRace and FinalDecision must have ManualReview before it and CheckApplicantRace cannot be immediately followed by FinalDecision

Name: Deductive Reasoning - PE
Text: So the updated model adds CheckApplicantRace and ManualReview to existence adds CheckApplicantRace to ManualReview in coexistence adds CheckApplicantRace to ManualReview in response adds FinalDecision to ManualReview in precedence and adds CheckApplicantRace to FinalDecision in nonsuccession

Name: Validation - PE
Text: This should ensure that when sensitive attributes are checked there is a ManualReview before the final decision preventing immediate biased decisions
